prompt_INIT_CONFIG_HERE_ANYWAY.message: Snulfu afaylu dagi akken yebɣu yili

prompt_KEYS_TO_IGNORE.message: Sekcem tasarut(s) akken ad ttuɣaleḍ (ssebɛed) neɣ ad tkecmeḍ (ssebɛed)

log_DEFAULT_CONFIG_CREATED_AT.message: Isebtar i yellan ddaw-a sɛan aseɣwen ɣer

log_NO_NEW_KEYS_ADDED.message: Ulac tasarut tamaynut yettwarnu (kulci yella yakan)

log_ALL_JSON_UPDATED.message: Iɣewwaṛen meṛṛa n JSON yettwabeddel akken iwata

tip_MOVE_CONFIG_TO_ROOT.message: Sbadu afaylu i uẓar n useqdec i tebɣiḍ ad t-tesqedceḍ deg

tip_USE_A_VPN.message: Seqdec VPN i usebded n usebter API

warn_DIR_NOT_FOUND.message: Ur yezmir ara ad d-naf asebter

err_PARSE_FAILED.message: Ur yezmir ara ad yekcem s tmaziɣt

err_TRANSLATE_FAILED_FOR_KEY.message: Tutlayt ur teddi ara i tsarut

err_EN_LOC_NOT_FOUND_AT.message: Tamurt n teglizit ur tettwafen ara deg

help_LOCALES_DIR.message: Isem n ufaylu yettwaxedmen ifuyla imezwura ("_locales")

help_KEYS.message: Tisura i usnulfu (amedya: "app_DESC, err_NOT_FOUND") (asnifel: akk tisura src yettwafernen deg yifuyla yettwafernen)

help_EXCLUDE_KEYS.message: Isebtar i yellan ddaw-a sɛan aseɣwen ɣer "App_NAME,author")

help_INIT.message: Rnu afaylu .translate-msgs.config.json5 i usebded n yifuyla imezwura

help_FORCE.message: Snulfu afaylu n uγewwaṛ yellan mi ara tesqedceḍ init
